title: ochrosia kilaueaensis
intro: Ochrosia kilaueaensis, also known as the Kilauea ochrosia, is a plant species endemic to Hawaii, classified as a shrub or small tree within the family Apocynaceae. The plant is said to have medicinal properties due to its compounds, including alkaloids and terpenoids. Traditional uses of Ochrosia kilaueaensis include its application in treating various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while its health benefits are associated with its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into an infusion or tincture, typically used orally for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
